playbook.intent: Opinion-only retro → data-driven 45-min retro that exits with 2-3 owned experiments.
playbook.scope: Team runs a 45-minute retro at sprint close. Inputs are not opinions only — also: AI-aggregated mistake-memory entries since last retro, DORA + alert-volume + on-call load + PR-cycle-time signals, value-stream-management lens. Outputs are 2-3 concrete experiments for the next sprint, each with an owner and a success criterion.

success-criteria.criterion: Each experiment has a written success criterion

stage.name: Pre-read
stage.intent: AI summarises mistakes + DORA + value-stream signals before the room sits.

tasks.task: AI synthesises mistake-memory since last retro
Publish a pre-read in the channel

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the pre-read is published. Retros that start without pre-read default to opinion-only.

stage.name: Run the 45-min retro
stage.intent: Look at signals + opinions; converge on 2-3 experiments.

tasks.task: Converge on 2-3 with owners + success criteria

stage.decision-gate: End at 45 min. Spill is a sign of unfocused facilitation — schedule a follow-up if needed.

stage.name: Wire experiments into sprint
stage.intent: Experiments become real tickets in the next sprint with success criteria.
stage.decision-gate: Required: tickets filed. Verbal experiments are next retro's complaints.

extra.value: [Daily standups — see daily-standup-ai-prebrief, Quarter retros — see quarter-planning-okr-reset, Performance reviews — out of scope]
[mistake-memory + pattern-memory updated through the sprint, DORA metrics available, Scrum/Kanban cadence in place]

[No pre-read — retro becomes opinions-only, More than 3 experiments — none ship, Experiments without success criteria — can't tell if they worked, Retro turns into theater for management — kills honesty]
['Did each experiment have a written success criterion?', 'Did we use the data, or just talk over it?', 'Will I know in 2 weeks whether this experiment succeeded?']

{human: faion get-content biweekly-retro-mistake-memory --format md, agent: faion get-content biweekly-retro-mistake-memory --format context, json: faion get-content biweekly-retro-mistake-memory --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P6 product-dev team persona}]
